name: La Chatelain Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Juice from jar of sliced, dill pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 2/3 cup real mayonnaise to a blender.
2. Add 2 tablespoons Wishbone Italian Dressing.
3. Add 2 tablespoons red wine vinegar.
4. Add 2 tablespoons juice from jar of sliced dill pickles.
5. Add 1/2 teaspoon salt.
6. Add the raw egg.
7. Add 1/4 teaspoon black pepper, coarsely ground.
8. Puree for 10 seconds or until all ingredients are well incorporated.
9. Pour dressing into a glass container.
10. Place the container in a double boiler that has been sprayed with non-stick spray.
11. Cook over simmering water while constantly stirring and scraping the pan with a rubber spatula until the dressing reaches the consistency of buttermilk.
12. Do not allow the water to boil rapidly, as this will cause the egg to scramble.
13. Store in the refrigerator until cool.
14. Serve over romaine lettuce and croutons, preferably from La Madeleine bakery.
15. Add a generous sprinkling of Kraft Parmesan cheese and toss.
